name: Maxon
description: '''Mason Jorge Reyes''' (June 16, 2004 – November 16, 2025), known professionally as '''Maxon''' (stylized in all lowercase, formely as '''Maxon Margiela'''), was an American rapper and songwriter from [[Orlando, Florida]]. He began making music professionally in 2024 and was known for his [[Gen-Z]] style of rap. He rose to prominence in late 2024 with the release of his singles "Austin Powers" and "Sexual Fantasies" featuring Percaso.
